summary: Iteration 24: MongoDB Refactor Verification — ALL 42 tests passed (32 existing E2E + 10 new MongoDB-specific tests). Frontend UI fully verified working. This validates the MAJOR REFACTOR that migrated all state from host filesystem to MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: agent_state.py correctly centralizes all state access to MongoDB
server.py startup correctly restores active agent from MongoDB (no filesystem reads)
agents.py create_agent stores genesis_prompt in MongoDB only (no ~/agents/ filesystem writes)
credits.py uses agent_state for key management (MongoDB source of truth)
genesis.py reads provisioning from MongoDB via load_provisioning()
live.py uses agent_state instead of genesis imports (MongoDB-backed)
sandbox_poller.py uses agent_state for all state access
seed_data_creation: Test agent created and deleted during test_create_agent_stores_in_mongodb test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 validated the MongoDB refactor. All state now lives in MongoDB — no host filesystem reads/writes for state. Key modules: agent_state.py (centralized state), server.py (startup restore from MongoDB), agents.py (create stores in MongoDB), credits.py (key management via MongoDB), genesis.py (provisioning from MongoDB), live.py (identity/tools from MongoDB). The refactor preserved all 32 existing API behaviors + 10 new MongoDB-specific tests pass.

mongodb_refactor_verification.provisioning_state_from_mongodb: PASS - genesis/status and provision/status read from MongoDB agents collection
mongodb_refactor_verification.conway_key_from_mongodb: PASS - key-status reads from MongoDB, set-key writes to MongoDB
mongodb_refactor_verification.agent_creation_mongodb_only: PASS - POST /agents/create stores genesis_prompt in MongoDB, NOT filesystem
mongodb_refactor_verification.live_tools_from_mongodb: PASS - /live/tools reads from provisioning state in MongoDB
mongodb_refactor_verification.agent_selection_mongodb_key: PASS - /agents/{id}/select loads Conway key from MongoDB

backend_apis_tested: GET /api/agents - 200 OK (auto-creates default anima-fund in MongoDB)
POST /api/agents/create - 400 Bad Request (requires telegram) / 200 OK with valid input

genesis_screen.agent_list_buttons: PASS - Shows 'Anima Fund' button (selected) and '+ Create' button
genesis_screen.conway_account_panel: PASS - Shows $0.00 balance with key prefix cnwy_k_HUFTe...
genesis_screen.refresh_button: PASS - Refresh button works (shows 'Refreshing balance...' toast)
genesis_screen.vm_tier_selector: PASS - All 5 tiers visible (Small $5, Medium $8, Large $15, X-Large $25, 2X-Large $45)
genesis_screen.provision_stepper: PASS - Shows 6 steps with Run buttons

create_agent_modal.modal_opens: PASS - Modal opens when clicking '+ Create'
create_agent_modal.genesis_prompt_textarea: PASS - Large textarea with 'Load Standard Template' button
create_agent_modal.telegram_inputs: PASS - Bot Token and Chat ID inputs (required)
create_agent_modal.wallet_inputs: PASS - SOL and ETH wallet inputs

dashboard.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All menu items visible (Anima VM, Agent Mind, Fund HQ, Agents, Infrastructure, Skills, Deal Flow, Portfolio, Financials, Activity, Memory, Configuration, Wallet & Logs)
dashboard.header: PASS - Shows 'Anima Fund' dropdown with green dot, Genesis pill, Wallet pill, LIVE indicator
dashboard.agent_mind_page: PASS - Shows 'Agent Mind — Live Feed' with engine status panel

refactor_notes.key_change_1: agent_state.py centralizes all state access — single source of truth
refactor_notes.key_change_3: create_agent() stores genesis_prompt in MongoDB only, no ~/agents/ writes
refactor_notes.key_change_4: get_conway_api_key() reads from MongoDB, falls back to env var only for initial setup
refactor_notes.key_change_5: load_provisioning() reads from MongoDB agents collection, not filesystem JSON
refactor_notes.key_change_6: All live/* endpoints use agent_state for identity/tools (MongoDB-backed)
